valdris-the-blade.name: Valdris the Blade
valdris-the-blade.description: A grizzled veteran with silver-streaked black hair and numerous scars. Known for his tactical brilliance and unwavering loyalty to his comrades. Wields a masterwork longsword with mysterious runes.
valdris-the-blade.personality: Stoic and professional in combat, surprisingly jovial over drinks. Has a soft spot for orphans and strays.
notable_moments: Led the defense of Thornkeep's eastern gate (Session 45)
Revealed his connection to the old war (Session 38)
Trained the party in advanced combat maneuvers (Session 31)
valdris-the-blade.secrets: Was once a member of the King's Shadow Guard before a mission went wrong
valdris-the-blade.current_quest: Investigating Crimson Hand movements in the region

mira-stonehelm.name: Captain Mira Stonehelm
mira-stonehelm.description: Stout and sturdy with braided copper hair and a magnificent beard adorned with small steel rings. Wears battered but well-maintained plate armor.
mira-stonehelm.personality: By-the-book and honorable, but not above bending rules when it serves the greater good. Deeply devout but questions her god's silence lately.
notable_moments: Arrested the party for unauthorized magic use (Session 12)
Became party ally after they saved her unit (Session 15)
Led the evacuation during the demon attack (Session 42)
mira-stonehelm.current_quest: Rooting out corrupt guards working with the Crimson Hand
